text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While I'm walking in the park...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Mmm, the weather's perfect today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Plop...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh? That sounded like a koi poking its head out
of the water. Must be hungry.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Carp out of water, in search of food it wanders: "Carpe diem," I say. Alas, one too many syllables.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Excuse you, Sky! How are you going to get ready
for the race with all this slacking off?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Why hello there, King. I was hoping for some fish
pellets, but oh well.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What in the world are you talking about?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Just fish food for thought. Is jogging on the
itinerary today, King? You sure are working hard.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well of course! We've got a race coming up and
you're out here again doing goodness knows
what!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, chillaaax. Haven't you heard of
strategic resting?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Strategic what now?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Look at the koi in the pond. Oh how relaxing it
must be to soak up the sun as you swim, eh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But watch this...

text_block_list.name: Pond Keeper
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, my little koi buddies. Time for a snack
break. C'mon, eat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Plip... Splosh, splish, sploosh!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
See that? They conserve their energy so that
when the time is right, they can swim real fast.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
When nothing's going on, they're chill as a
cucumber. That must be why the koi is the
"freshwater king."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: King, you say?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yup, king. See what I'm getting at? I'm
strategically resting now to reap the rewards
later.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You catch my drift since you're a king and all,
right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
O-of course! I know everything there is to know
when it comes to kings! But...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Still on the fence, hm? Well then...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, you! Yes, you!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm talking to you. You've been following
our conversation, right? Don't you agree with
me?
choice_data_list: Tell her that she's just good at making excuses.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
See? Now that's a nod with conviction! We should
all strive to rest with the leisurely ease of kings!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It sounded too good to be true when it was just
you blabbering... But I suppose you must be right.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ You should join me like the king you are
and laze abou—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I mean, strategically rest! Just gently close your eyes... That's it... Now take deep breaths...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
There, nice and peaceful. Today's weather really
is perfect! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Aha! I almost got caught up in your overly
laid-back ways!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: SKYYYYY!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoops, this isn't looking good.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You'll have the honor of joining me on my jog!
We leave at once!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But, King—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
LA, LA, LAA! I CAN'T HEAR YOU! Get those legs
moving!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Urk, my words were oil to the flames. The
schemer drowns in her own scheme...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A worked-up King Halo drags Seiun Sky along for
a jog.
